task_completion.description: Create a top-level Order Group named 'In-House Lab'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration screen, list, or tree view in LibreHealth EHR showing an Order Group with the exact name 'In-House Lab'.

task_completion.description: Create a Procedure Order named 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' within the 'In-House Lab' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Procedure Order named 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' displayed as a child or member of the 'In-House Lab' Order Group.

task_completion.description: Assign Procedure Code '80053' and Standard Code 'CPT4:80053' to the Procedure Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration form or details view for 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' showing '80053' in the Procedure Code field and 'CPT4:80053' in the Standard Code field.

task_completion.description: Include a Discrete Result for 'Glucose' with Code 'GLU'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Discrete Result entry named 'Glucose' with the code 'GLU' listed under or linked to the 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' procedure.

task_completion.description: Include a Discrete Result for 'Creatinine' with Code 'CREAT'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Discrete Result entry named 'Creatinine' with the code 'CREAT' listed under or linked to the 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' procedure.

task_completion.description: Include a Discrete Result for 'Sodium' with Code 'NA'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Discrete Result entry named 'Sodium' with the code 'NA' listed under or linked to the 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' procedure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task configures a Comprehensive Metabolic Panel in LibreHealth EHR. Verified values to check: Group Name: 'In-House Lab', Order Name: 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel', Order Code: '80053', Standard Code: 'CPT4:80053'. The procedure must include exactly three discrete results with specific names and codes: 'Glucose' (Code: 'GLU'), 'Creatinine' (Code: 'CREAT'), and 'Sodium' (Code: 'NA'). These are standard medical codes and abbreviations verified against authoritative medical coding sources.
